buildLog.detail: Scaffolded Next.js 15 app with package.json, tsconfig, postcss, layout, globals.css
LivenessOracle.sol: heartbeat(), lastSeen(), isAlive(), status() — fully permissionless
lib/contract.ts: ABI, provider helpers, queryAgentStatus(), formatAge(). lib/constants.ts: chain config, thresholds
HeartbeatCard.tsx, StatusIndicator.tsx, LiveFeed.tsx — dark theme, pulse animations
/api/heartbeat/[agentId]: free query. /api/x402/query: 402 payment required, $0.01 USDC via x402
Hero with 'Is your agent alive?' tagline, 3-step explainer, ERC-8004 badge, contract snippet, API docs
Client component: agent cards, live feed, summary stats, search by ID/name, 30s auto-refresh
npm run build passed — TypeScript strict mode, no errors
git commit: 🤖 [auto] full build: landing, dashboard, contract, API routes, components

notes: Contract deployment to Base pending Max's approval. x402 facilitator address TBD post-deployment. All mock data will be replaced with live on-chain queries once contract is deployed.
